cron="" · period=0
original_temp = (#WineCellar #TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature

delay(10 MIN)

temp = (#WineCellar #TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature

if (temp >= original_temp + 1 or temp <= original_temp - 1) {

    (#Speaker).speaker_speak("와인셀러의 온도가 급변했습니다")
}

Generated JOICode

delay(10 MIN)
new_temp = (#WineCellar_Temp #WineCellar #TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature
if (abs(new_temp - original_temp) >= 1) {
    (#Speaker).speaker_speak("와인셀러의 온도가 급변했습니다")
}

cron="" · period=0
prev := (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_carbondioxide
curr = (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_carbondioxide
personDetected := (#PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence
if (prev < 1200 and curr >= 1200 and personDetected == true) {
    (#AirPurifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("high")
    (#Speaker).speaker_speak("와인셀러의 온도가 급변했습니다")
}
prev = curr

cron="" · period=0
if ((#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_carbondioxide >= 1500 and (#Blind).armrobot_currentposition == 0) {

    (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode("auto")

    (#Blind).windowcovering_uporopen()

}

Generated JOICode

cron="" · period=0
prev := (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_mode
curr = (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_mode
if (prev != "dehumidifying" and curr == "dehumidifying") {
    (#AirPurifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("auto")
}
prev = curr
delay(1 HOUR)
prev := (#Window).armrobot_currentposition
curr = (#Window).armrobot_currentposition
if (prev == 0 and curr > 0) {
    (#Window).windowcovering_downorclose()
} else if (prev > 0 and curr == 0) {
    (#Window).windowcovering_uporopen()
}
prev = curr

enum_groundingextraneousgt_mismatchgt_receiver_coveragegt_service_coveragenumeric_groundingsemanticservice_matchunknown_service:airpurifier_mode

(#AirPurifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("auto")
(#Blind).windowcovering_uporopen()}
prev = curr
}delay(1 HOUR)
prev := (#Window).armrobot_currentposition
curr = (#Window).armrobot_currentposition
if (prev == 0 and curr > 0) {
(#Window).windowcovering_downorclose()
} else if (prev > 0 and curr == 0) {
(#Window).windowcovering_uporopen()
}
prev = curr

Row 182 · Category 7

Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=1800000
temp = (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature

if (temp >= 20 and temp < 30) {

    (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("auto")

} else if (temp >= 30) {

    (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("cool")

}

Generated JOICode

cron="" · period=1800000
prev_temp := (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature
curr_temp = (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature
if (curr_temp >= 30) {
    if (prev_temp < 30) {
        (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("cool")
    }
} else {
    if (prev_temp >= 30) {
        (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("auto")
    }
}
prev_temp = curr_temp

Failure Reasons

enum_groundinggt_mismatchnumeric_grounding

GTGenerated
temp = (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperatureprev_temp := (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature
curr_temp = (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturesensor_temperature
if (temp >= 20 and temp < 30) {if (curr_temp >= 30) {
if (prev_temp < 30) {
(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("auto") (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("cool")
}
} else if (temp >= 30) {} else {
if (prev_temp >= 30) {
(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("cool") (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode("auto")
}
}}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=3600000
dust = (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel

if (dust >= 200) {

    (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode("high")

} else if (dust <= 100) {

    (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode("low")

}

Generated JOICode

cron="" · period=0
prev := (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel
curr = (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel
delay(1 HOUR)
new := (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel
if (new >= 200 OR new <= 100) {
    if (new >= 200) {
        (#AirPurifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("high")
    } else {
        (#AirPurifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("low")
    }
}

new := (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel

GT JOICode

cron=0 0 * * 6-7 · period=1800000
if ((#Clock).clock_weekday != "saturday" and (#Clock).clock_weekday != "sunday") {

    break

}

if (all(#Factory #Pump).switch_switch ==| true) {

    all(#Factory #Pump).switch_off()

    (#EmailProvider).emailprovider_sendmail("test@example.com", "위험", "펌프가 켜졌습니다")

}

Generated JOICode

cron=0 0 * * 6-7 · period=1800000
if ((#Clock).clock_weekday != "saturday" and (#Clock).clock_weekday != "sunday") {
    break
}

prev := (#Factory #Pump).pump_switch
if (prev == false) {
    (#Factory #Pump).pump_mode := "normal"
    (#Factory #Pump).pump_on()
} else {
    (#Factory #Pump).pump_off()
}

Failure Reasons

arg_typedataflowextraneousgt_mismatchgt_receiver_coveragegt_service_coveragepreconditionsemanticservice_matchunknown_service:pump_modeunknown_service:pump_offunknown_service:pump_onunknown_service:pump_switch

GTGenerated

break
break}
}prev := (#Factory #Pump).pump_switch
if (prev == false) {
if (all(#Factory #Pump).switch_switch ==| true) { (#Factory #Pump).pump_mode := "normal"
(#Factory #Pump).pump_on()
all(#Factory #Pump).switch_off()} else {
(#Factory #Pump).pump_off()
(#EmailProvider).emailprovider_sendmail("test@example.com", "위험", "펌프가 켜졌습니다")}
}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
triggered := false
if ((#MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion == true) {
    if (triggered == false) {
        new = (#Light).light_currentbrightness + 10
        if (new >= 100) { (#Light).light_movetobrightness(100, 0); break; }
        else { (#Light).light_movetobrightness(new, 0); }
        triggered = true
    }
} else {
    triggered = false
}

Generated JOICode

cron="" · period=0
prev := (#MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion
curr = (#MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion
if (prev == false and curr == true) {
    (#Light).light_movetobrightness((#Light).light_currentbrightness + 10, 0)
    if ((#Light).light_currentbrightness >= 100) {
        (#Light).switch_off()
    }
}
prev = curr

gt_mismatchnumeric_grounding

else { (#Light).light_movetobrightness(new, 0); } (#Light).switch_off()
triggered = true }
}}
} else {prev = curr
triggered = false

cron="" · period=300000
active := 0

if (active == 0) {

    wait until ((#SmokeDetector).smokedetector_smoke == true)

    (#Speaker).speaker_speak("화재 발생! 즉시 대피하세요." )

    active = 1

}

(#EmailProvider).emailprovider_sendmail("test@example.com", "화재 경고", "화재가 발생했습니다. 대피하세요.")

}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate

curr = (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate

if (prev != "closed" and curr == "closed") {

    (#Entrance #Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(10 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#Entrance #PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence

curr = (#Entrance #PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence

if (prev == false and curr == true) {

    (#Entrance #Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(3 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr

    while (true) {
        delay(10 SEC)
        co2_level_new = (#ParkingLot #AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_carbondioxide

            break
        }
    }
}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#MeetingRoom #Door).door_doorstate
 
curr = (#MeetingRoom #Door).door_doorstate

if (prev != "open" and curr == "open") {

    (#Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(10 SEC)

    (#Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr
